response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer with two decades of shipping across web, backend, and embedded systems, a CS degree from ETH Zürich, and directly relevant recent work on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and his hands-on GenAI experience spans roughly one year; the resume shows no evidence of Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/observability work, which are core to this position. He could be worth a conversation if the pipeline is thin, given his MCP experience and consulting-style background, but he does not meet the stated experience bar.
strengths: Hands-on experience with MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling, a key technology for this role
Deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise plus high-throughput, low-latency systems experience (millions of requests/sec)
Customer-facing and mentoring track record: consulting, workshops, courses, and open-source project leadership
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building production AI solutions (~1 year of GenAI work)
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation pipelines
Python is absent from the resume, and cloud experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) is not tied to AI system design

key_factors.factor: No RAG or vector database evidence
